title: Alysia SMP | Vanilla+
body:
# Alysia SMP!

Alysia SMP aims to be an LGBTQ+ friendly survival vanilla+ multiplayer community devoted to having fun together. We're foccused on player communication and having a player-driven server.

Our mods aim to improve the experience for new and veteran Minecraft players by adding things like

* Proximity voice chat
* Farmer's delight (And other cooking mods)
* QoL mods, such as Jade and JEI.

All of the mods are meant to encourage socialization and adjust small things that are either broken in minecraft or could be better! **Nothing too big in terms of mods, don't worry.**

Our server is whitelist only to add an extra step to ensure that all of our players are here for the right reasons and don't want to troll.

If this seems good for you, feel free to join at [smp.alysia.online](http://smp.alysia.online) (Discord link)
